title: Cacalia levingei

This plant is native to China and is part of the genus Cacalia, which includes several species of flowering plants. intro: Cacalia levingei, also known as Khatutop, is a plant species in the family Compositae, native to the Himalayan region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
